content:
3. Should an archetype exist that can “transfer” a curse to another player?

✔ Example: A “Plaguebearer” character can shift debuffs to someone else but must pay an XP price.

🚀 Version 7.0 now finalizes custom dice rolls, setting-based professor buffs, cryptic leader selection, Observer activation mechanics, and structured Faustian Bargains.
🔥 Are we fully locking this in? 🎮📖

📌 Version 7.1 – Character-Specific Roles, Professor’s Secret Rolls & Duties, and Item-Based Curse Transfer


🚀 This iteration assigns unique in-game roles to each archetype, determines all secret professor rolls, and moves curse transfer mechanics into items.

📜 1. Character-Specific Roles – Special Jobs & Abilities Per Archetype

📜 Each student character now has an additional role based on their archetype, further deepening strategic play.
